Module 5
Creating Your PLC, Part 2
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

Screencap video vs. full motion video
▪ 	Screencap is often easier than Full Motion
▪ 	It’s easier to deliver a script with Screencap
▪ 	With Screencap, you usually record the audio first and then do the
on-screen video recording
▪ 	Some people don’t like to be on camera… Full Motion is painful
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Screencap video vs. full motion video
▪ 	It’s generally easier for the viewer to connect with you with Full
Motion
▪ 	It’s easier to edit screencap after the fact
▪ 	Screencap can often be a lot faster to create
▪ 	Screencap can be slower if you want to use fancy animations
▪ 	You can mix Full Motion with Screencap
Module 5: Creating Your Prelaunch Content
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
